reviews.review_description:
I have a copy of "Reflex Punk" (which I quite like, it's fairly unique for boxercise), and I'm assuming this is from the same dev, as it mostly feels like a MR version of that game, with some extra bells and whistles.  There was another game (same dev I think) called "Beat the Bag", which I never got to try as it tried to push you into signing up for a paid subscription before you even got to try the thing.  This seems to be a mix of both, with extras.  For now at least, the Reflex Punk elements of the game seem to be free to play, while other parts of the game are behind a paywall (£12 per month subscription).  Personally, I don't do subscriptions for games, so I'll never know what those other elements include, but the MR version of RP seems pretty nice at a glance.  MR's always a bonus for games that include a lot of movement.  If y'all could make that screen behind the Demons a YouTube player, so I could exercise while watching vids (rather than just showing pics - I've been looking for something like that without much luck), and make it a one off payment, I might be tempted.  As is, I'll stick with RP.

EDIT (following dev response):  I just typed "reflex punk meta quest" into YouTube and not one single video displayed, so yeah, of course it's not paying anybody's bills, nobody knows it exists.  Maybe try offering a few VR Ytubers a free key for a review or something.  I actually quite like your products, but suspect you'd do better pricing them appropriately, and investing some time into marketing them.  But hey, you do you.  :)  Good luck!
Can't wait to see future updates and where the devs take this.
